howItWorks.intro: This due date calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Naegele's Rule: Due Date = LMP + 280 days (40 weeks)
Only 5% of babies arrive on the exact due date
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How is the due date calculated?
faq.answer: The most common method (Naegele's Rule) adds 280 days (40 weeks) to the first day of your last menstrual period (LMP). This assumes a 28-day cycle with ovulation on day 14. Ultrasound dating may adjust this.

faq.question: How accurate is a due date?
faq.answer: Only about 5% of babies are born on their due date. Most arrive within 2 weeks before or after. Full-term is considered 39-40 weeks. Babies born 37-38 weeks are early term, 41+ weeks are late term.

faq.question: Can my due date change?
faq.answer: Yes. If an early ultrasound (before 13 weeks) differs from the LMP calculation by more than 5-7 days, your provider may adjust the due date. Ultrasound dating is most accurate in the first trimester.

faq.question: Is the Due Date Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard pregnancy and parenting formulas trusted by expecting parents. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Due Date Calculator?
sections.body: The Due Date Calculator is a free online tool designed for expecting parents who need quick, accurate calculations in the pregnancy and parenting space. By entering your lmp month, lmp day, lmp year, you get instant results including estimated due date, weeks pregnant today, current trimester. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting estimated due date right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In pregnancy and parenting, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by expecting parents worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to prepare for parenthood with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your lmp month and need to find the right estimated due date. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
